name: Google Workspace Stale Active Accounts (180 days)
description: Detects long-dormant active google_workspace accounts with no recent login activity for 180 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_login_time AS last_login FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND (u.last_login_time IS NULL OR u.last_login_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days')
remediation: Immediately disable long-dormant accounts and require formal reactivation approval for reinstatement.
